name: MYRC
collateral: Malaysian Ringgit cash deposits held in a ring-fenced bank account at Maybank (Malayan Banking Berhad) under the custody and trustee services of Universal Trustee (Malaysia) Bhd (UTMB)
pegMechanism: 1:1 mint and redemption against Malaysian Ringgit via Malaysian banking rails (FPX). Eligibility requires Malaysian eKYC (MyKad) and a linked Malaysian bank account; mint authority on each chain is restricted to a Blox-controlled key.

reserves.name: MYR cash deposits at Maybank (UTMB trustee)

notices.title: Issuer not licensed
notices.message: Blox Blockchain Sdn Bhd does not hold a Bank Negara Malaysia or Securities Commission Malaysia license. SC Malaysia disclaimed jurisdiction in 2022; BNM has not yet established a payment-stablecoin framework as of 2026.

notices.title: Small float, single-jurisdiction
notices.message: Total circulating supply is approximately MYR 5.3M (~USD 1.3M) and reserves are concentrated in a single Malaysian bank (Maybank) under a single Malaysian trustee.
